headline: Resmed Completes Acquisition of Noctrix Health, Expanding Clinical Sleep Health Portfolio
summary: Acquisition adds Nidra® Tonic Motor Activation (TOMAC) Therapy, an FDA De Novo classified, nonpharmacologic treatment designed to address moderate-to-severe Restless Legs Syndrome (RLS).SAN DIEGO, June 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Resmed (NYSE: RMD, ASX: RMD), the leading health technology company focused on sleep, breathing and care delivered in the home, today announced it has completed its acquisition of Noctrix Health, Inc., a medical device company developing clinically validated wearable t
